cities.name: Sydney, Australia
cities.description: A vibrant city known for its iconic Opera House and beautiful harbour.

cities.name: Melbourne, Australia
cities.description: A cultural hub famous for its graffiti lanes, coffee culture, and arts scene.

cities.name: Tokyo, Japan
cities.description: A bustling metropolis blending ultra-modern skyscrapers with historic temples.

cities.name: Kyoto, Japan
cities.description: Famous for its classical Buddhist temples, gardens, and traditional wooden houses.

temples.name: Angkor Wat, Cambodia
temples.description: A massive Buddhist temple complex located in northern Cambodia, originally built as a Hindu temple.

temples.name: Akshardham, Delhi, India
temples.description: A spiritual-cultural campus displaying millennia of traditional Hindu culture and spirituality.

beaches.name: Bora Bora, French Polynesia
beaches.description: A small South Pacific island northwest of Tahiti, famous for its turquoise lagoons and luxury resorts.

beaches.name: Copacabana, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
beaches.description: A world-famous 4km beach known for its lively atmosphere, beach volleyball, and scenic promenade.
